name: Ang
description_short: ANG Federal Credit Union is a Birmingham-based credit union established in 1957, serving 1,900+ members with $24.5M in assets and tailored financial products for military organizations.
description_long:
ANG Federal Credit Union was established in 1957 and is headquartered in Birmingham, Alabama. The institution has maintained steady operations for over 65 years, serving a focused membership base with deep roots in military communities. With over 1,900 loyal members and $24.5 million in assets under management, ANG operates as a member-owned cooperative financial institution.

ANG offers a comprehensive suite of consumer banking services including checking and savings accounts, credit cards, auto loans, personal loans, certificates of deposit, mortgages, and wire transfers. Members have access to online banking with bill pay, remote deposit capture, e-statements, and a mobile app available on iOS and Android. The credit union also provides financial calculators for mortgages, auto loans, and credit card payoff planning, along with account aggregation services and drive-thru teller access.

ANG differentiates itself through its specialized focus on military organizations and personnel, offering tailored financial products designed for military economic needs. The institution maintains a single branch location at 5401 East Lake Boulevard in Birmingham with one ATM and provides service status monitoring for online banking, mobile app, ATM, phone, and traditional services. The credit union employs over 6 dedicated staff members and maintains an active community Q&A forum for member support.

As a smaller credit union, ANG's primary limitation is its single-branch footprint and limited geographic accessibility, making it most suitable for members in the Birmingham area or those with military affiliations who can access services remotely. While the institution offers standard credit union products and online/mobile banking capabilities, it lacks the extensive branch network and advanced digital features of larger financial institutions. The credit union currently shows lobby and drive-thru as closed on the website, which may reflect outdated information or temporary closures requiring direct contact for clarification.
pros: Specializes in military-focused financial products tailored to military personnel needs
Offers comprehensive online banking with bill pay, remote deposit capture, and e-statements
Mobile app available for both iOS and Android devices
Low-cost financial calculators for mortgages, auto loans, and credit card payoff planning
Member-owned credit union structure with 1,900+ loyal members
Provides both adjustable and fixed-rate mortgage options
Active community Q&A forum with financial expertise available to members
cons: Single branch location limits in-person accessibility to Birmingham area only
Website shows lobby and drive-thru currently closed with no updated reopening information
Limited asset base ($24.5M) and smaller member base compared to regional/national credit unions
Minimal online review data available (zero reviews on profile) limits transparency
No mention of ATM network partnerships or shared branching agreements to expand access
best_for: Military personnel and families seeking specialized financial products and military-focused services
Birmingham, Alabama residents looking for a community-oriented credit union alternative
Members who prefer online and mobile banking with remote account management capabilities
Individuals seeking auto loans, mortgages, and personal loans with credit union-level rates
diagnosis: ANG Federal Credit Union is best for military-affiliated members in the Birmingham area seeking specialized financial products and online banking convenience. The primary caveat is the single-branch footprint and unconfirmed current operating hours—prospective members should contact directly at (205) 841-4525 to verify accessibility and service availability before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
